workOrder.title: Add linked-work context to student-detail Mentor Meeting rows
workOrder.selectedReason: Existing scoped mentor meeting rows already had submission_id, and existing submissions/requirements can provide useful linked-work context without a new route, fake page, mutation control, or access expansion.

userFacingChange: Authorized student-detail Mentor Meeting rows show the linked requirement title, submission version, and submission status when a meeting supports submitted work.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: Reuses existing student-detail authorization and role visibility.
Does not add a new route, query path, mutation control, or role permission.
Mentor tab renders linked-work labels and tests prove the raw linked submission ID is not rendered in the meeting row.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor assignment, student privacy, migration, Cloudflare, OAuth, secrets, env, deploy, or live data settings changed.

validation.notes: Full validation passed. git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings, with no whitespace errors.

deferred: Standalone mentor meeting section remains unnecessary until a real route/UI contract is needed.
Meeting mutation polish, reassignment, and remove controls need product/security decisions.
Review Queue and Student Directory missing/evidence filters remain unsupported.

nextRecommended.summary: Inspect whether mentor meeting record/create UX can be safely clarified without adding mutation rights.

doNotRepeat: Do not re-add linked-work context to Mentor Meeting rows unless regression removes submissionTitle or Linked work rendering.
